prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该校在甘肃理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约9646名、9913名、7845名、9844名、6911名，整体波动较大，近两年呈先降后升态势；2025年基准位次约6911名，为近五年最好水平；该校在甘肃理科（物理类）招生计划2021年47人、2022年49人、2023年48人、2024年48人、2025年50人，呈小幅增长；2026年计划大幅扩招至61人，较2025年增加11人（增幅22%），扩招力度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国石油大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第62名，近年排名稳定在48–62名区间，属于中上游理工类211院校，办学实力和行业认可度较高；2026年高考周期内该校无显著声誉事件记录，舆情平稳；抖音平台热度未进入前106名，短视频曝光量一般，报考关注度处于中等水平，未出现明显升温或降温信号；该校以石油石化特色著称，石油与天然气工程等学科为传统优势领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关工科专业社会热度总体平稳；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数约218700人，按近年物理类占比约66.6%估算，物理类考生约145654人，较2025年121443人增加约20%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；该校位于北京市，对甘肃考生属于跨省就读，近年该校在甘肃招生计划持续增加，2026年扩招至61人，表明对甘肃生源的重视程度提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6911名、2026年大幅扩招22%的缓解效应、以及甘肃省物理类考生增加约20%带来的竞争加剧；考虑考生规模扩大对竞争的推升作用略强于扩招的缓解作用，预测2026年最低录取位次约7773名，较2025年小幅后移（位次数字增大），区间7273–8273名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约7773名，区间7273–8273名。位次在区间下限（7273名）以内可重点冲刺一档石油工程、计算机等热门专业；位次在区间中段（约7773名）建议以二档新能源、化工等专业为主；位次在区间上限（8273名）附近建议以三档专业保底，同时关注扩招带来的录取机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this university in Gansu science (physics category) were approximately 9646, 9913, 7845, 9844, and 6911 respectively, showing overall large fluctuations, with a trend of first decreasing then increasing in recent years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 6911, the best level in the past five years; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu science (physics category) was 47 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 50 in 2025, showing a slight increase; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 61, an increase of 11 (22%) over 2025, with a notable expansion intensity that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 62nd, with stable rankings in the 48–62 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of science and engineering 211 institutions, with strong educational strength and high industry recognition; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, there are no significant reputation events recorded for this university, with stable public opinion; its popularity on Douyin has not entered the top 106, with general short video exposure, and application attention is at a moderate level, without obvious signs of heating up or cooling down; the university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum and natural gas engineering as traditional advantageous fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of related engineering majors is generally stable; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province general college entrance examination is about 218,700, and based on the recent physics category proportion of about 66.6%, the estimated number of physics category candidates is about 145,654, an increase of about 20% compared to 121,443 in 2025, with a significant expansion in candidate scale, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial study for Gansu candidates; in recent years, the university's enrollment plan in Gansu has been continuously increasing, expanding to 61 in 2026, indicating an increased emphasis on Gansu student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 6911, the mitigation effect of a 22% expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 20% increase in Gansu physics category candidates; considering that the push effect of candidate scale expansion on competition is slightly stronger than the mitigation effect of expansion, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 7773, a slight backward shift (larger ranking number) compared to 2025, with a range of 7273–8273.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 7773, range 7273–8273. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (7273) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Petroleum Engineering and Computer Science; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 7773) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors like New Energy and Chemical Engineering; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (8273) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while paying attention to admission opportunities brought by the expansion.
